Class Post

java.lang.Object
entityClasses.Post
public class Post extends Object
Represents a discussion post and provides class-level CRUD operations for post management.

This class satisfies TP2 Task 3 by combining:

  • Post attributes needed by Students User Stories and future staff epics.
  • Input validation for safe create/update behavior.
  • CRUD operations over an in-memory post repository.

Students User Story coverage:

  • Create: students can submit a post with validated fields.
  • Read: users can retrieve one post, all posts, or search subsets.
  • Update: users can modify title/body/course/resolved status.
  • Delete: posts can be removed by id.

TP3 readiness: Course context, author identity, and resolved status are included to support future instructional analytics and participation workflows.

Version:
2.00 2026-03-18 Added CRUD and validation operations to Post class
Author:
TP2 Team

    Indicates whether the post question is considered resolved.

    title
    Short subject line shown in post lists.

  • Field Details

    • allPosts

      private static final List<Post> allPosts
      Repository of all posts for CRUD actions in this class.

    • subsetPosts

      private static List<Post> subsetPosts
      Last computed subset for search/filter operations.

    • postId

      private int postId
      Unique identifier for this post.

      Rationale: stable IDs provide a reliable target for update/delete operations and avoid ambiguity when titles are similar.

    • title

      private String title
      Short subject line shown in post lists.

      Rationale: students need a concise summary for scanning discussion threads quickly.

    • body

      private String body
      Main post content written by the author.

      Rationale: captures the full question/idea needed for discussion and reply workflows.

    • courseTag

      private String courseTag
      Course context tag such as CSE360.

      Rationale: enables filtering/grouping when a system supports multiple courses or topics.

    • authorAsuUserId

      private String authorAsuUserId
      Author identifier for ownership, accountability, and role-based actions.

      Rationale: used for displaying who posted and for future permission checks and analytics.

    • resolved

      private boolean resolved
      Indicates whether the post question is considered resolved.

      Rationale: supports student visibility and future instructional-team workflows that track unresolved questions and participation outcomes.

  • Constructor Details

    • Post

      public Post(int postId, String title, String body, String courseTag, String authorAsuUserId, boolean resolved)
      Creates a new post with all required domain attributes.
      Parameters:
      postId - unique post identifier
      title - post title shown in summaries
      body - full discussion content
      courseTag - course/topic context tag
      authorAsuUserId - ASU user id of the post author
      resolved - true when post is resolved; false otherwise

  • Method Details

    • getPostId

      public int getPostId()
      Returns this post's unique identifier.
      Returns:
      post id

    • setPostId

      public void setPostId(int postId)
      Updates this post's unique identifier.
      Parameters:
      postId - new post id

    • getTitle

      public String getTitle()
      Returns the current post title.
      Returns:
      post title

    • setTitle

      public void setTitle(String title)
      Updates the post title.
      Parameters:
      title - new title value

    • getBody

      public String getBody()
      Returns the current post body text.
      Returns:
      post body

    • setBody

      public void setBody(String body)
      Updates the post body text.
      Parameters:
      body - new body value

    • getCourseTag

      public String getCourseTag()
      Returns the course tag used for this post.
      Returns:
      course tag

    • setCourseTag

      public void setCourseTag(String courseTag)
      Updates the course tag used for this post.
      Parameters:
      courseTag - new course tag value

    • getAuthorAsuUserId

      public String getAuthorAsuUserId()
      Returns the ASU user id of the post author.
      Returns:
      author ASU user id

    • setAuthorAsuUserId

      public void setAuthorAsuUserId(String authorAsuUserId)
      Updates the ASU user id of the post author.
      Parameters:
      authorAsuUserId - new author id

    • isResolved

      public boolean isResolved()
      Indicates whether this post is marked resolved.
      Returns:
      true if resolved; false otherwise

    • setResolved

      public void setResolved(boolean resolved)
      Updates the resolved state of this post.
      Parameters:
      resolved - new resolved flag value

    • createPost

      public static String createPost(Post post)
      Creates a post after validating all required fields.
      Parameters:
      post - post to create
      Returns:
      null when successful; otherwise a validation or duplicate-id message

    • readPostById

      public static Post readPostById(int postId)
      Reads a post by its unique id.
      Parameters:
      postId - post id to read
      Returns:
      matching post or null when not found

    • readAllPosts

      public static List<Post> readAllPosts()
      Reads all posts as a defensive copy.
      Returns:
      copy of all posts

    • readSubsetPosts

      public static List<Post> readSubsetPosts()
      Reads the current subset view as a defensive copy.
      Returns:
      copy of subset posts

    • updatePost

      public static String updatePost(int postId, String newTitle, String newBody, String newCourseTag, boolean newResolved)
      Updates an existing post.
      Parameters:
      postId - id of post to update
      newTitle - new title
      newBody - new body
      newCourseTag - new course tag
      newResolved - new resolved state
      Returns:
      null when successful; otherwise an error message

    • deletePost

      public static boolean deletePost(int postId)
      Deletes a post by id.
      Parameters:
      postId - id of post to delete
      Returns:
      true when removed; false when not found

    • setSubsetFromCourseTag

      public static void setSubsetFromCourseTag(String courseTag)
      Builds a subset using course tag equality (case-insensitive).
      Parameters:
      courseTag - course tag used for filtering

    • setSubsetFromKeyword

      public static void setSubsetFromKeyword(String keyword)
      Builds a subset from keyword matches in title or body.
      Parameters:
      keyword - keyword text to search

    • clearSubset

      public static void clearSubset()
      Clears all subset results.

    • clearAllPosts

      public static void clearAllPosts()
      Utility for tests to reset all stored posts.

    • validatePost

      private static String validatePost(Post post)
      Validates a post object before create.
      Parameters:
      post - post to validate
      Returns:
      null if valid; otherwise error message
